opinion.h4: UNITED STATES v. WOODSON ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA. No. 162. Decided October 8, 1962.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Cox, Assistant Attorney General Loevinger and Lionel Kestenbaum for the United States.

John J. Carmody, John J. Wilson, Charles J. Steele, Francis J. Kelly, Lawrence J. Latto, Francis M. Shea, Richard T. Conway, Ellsworth T. Simpson, William F. Kelly, Richard H. Nicolaides and W. V. T. Justis for appellees.
The judgment is reversed. United States v. Wise, 370 U.S. 405.
MR. JUSTICE GOLDBERG took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
